subject: Dartrix, a barn-owl-like Pokemon with a white facial disc and green body, perched on a branch in a dark forest
description: A round, owl-like creature with a white facial disc and dark green body perches on a branch amid a dense, shadowed forest. The background is composed of tall dark tree silhouettes against a dim, diffused light. The creature faces the viewer with a calm, slightly aloof expression. Its plumage is detailed with green and dark tones. The overall mood is tranquil and woodland-mysterious.
foreground: owl-like creature perched on a branch
